brand.name: Forno Nero
brand.tagline: Wood-fired pizza shaped by flour, flame, and patience.

hero.title: Fire. Flour. Time.
hero.description: Slow-fermented dough, honest ingredients, and a 450-degree oven. Every pie arrives with char, lift, and balance.
hero.imageAlt: Forno Nero wood-fired salami and mushroom pizza with blistered crust

signature.title: The Nero Margherita
signature.description: San Marzano tomato, fior di latte, basil, extra virgin olive oil, sea salt, and a blistered cornicione from the live-fire oven.
signature.imageAlt: Artisan margherita pizza fresh from the oven

dishes.title: Fired by nature
dishes.description: A focused collection of seasonal pies, small plates, and slow desserts made for the table.

items.name: Nero Margherita
items.description: Tomato, fior di latte, basil, olive oil.

items.name: Funghi and Truffle
items.description: Wild mushrooms, fior di latte, truffle crema.

items.name: Charred Rapini
items.imageAlt: Charred greens on a ceramic plate

menu.title: Simple ingredients. Extraordinary results.
menu.description: Our menu changes with the market while the standards stay the same: patient dough, clean flavor, live fire.

items.name: The Nero Margherita
items.description: Tomato, fior di latte, basil, extra virgin olive oil.

items.name: Diavola
items.description: Tomato, spicy salumi, hot honey, oregano.

items.name: Salsiccia and Rapini
items.description: Sausage, rapini, fior di latte, chile.

items.name: Burrata and Ember Bread
items.description: Warm bread, tomato conserva, basil oil.

story.title: Rooted in craft
story.description: Forno Nero is where time-honored technique meets a restless passion for better. We work with local farmers, slow-ferment our dough for 48 hours, and fire every pizza in our hand-built oven.
story.imageAlt: Chef shaping dough in a dark open kitchen

gallery.title: A glimpse inside
gallery.description: Hands in flour, glowing embers, long tables, and the final blistered crust.

images.imageAlt: Chef at work in the kitchen

items.quote: The crust has real character. Airy, charred, and somehow still delicate.
items.name: Jessica Moretti

items.quote: You can taste the patience in the dough and the confidence in every topping.
items.name: Adrian Russo

items.quote: The dining room glows, the wine list is sharp, and the pizza is worth crossing town for.
items.name: Camille Hart

contact.title: Your table by the fire
contact.description: Join us for dinner, reserve the long table, or order a few pies to enjoy at home.

footer.note: Slow dough, live fire, and a dining room built for long evenings.
